Spring Barley: (1) Regional areas for 2010 onwards have been replaced with the final regional breakdowns from the June Survey of Agriculture. Regional yields have been recalculated as a result, although any changes are very minor. National areas, national yields and all production figures remain unchanged. See metadata tab for further details.

(2) In all years prior to 2022, production standardised to 14.5% moisture content for cereals. From 2022 production only adjusted for farms that reported moisture content for cereals above 14.5%. See metadata tab for further details
(3) Moisture content data for Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland are not available and as a result UK figures cannot be calculated.
